33 /*---------------------------------------------------------------------------*/
34 /*---------------------------------------------------------------------------*/
35 
36 BEGIN_ARCGEOSIM_NAMESPACE
37 BEGIN_SURFACE_NAMESPACE
38 
39 class NotMatchingSurfaceMngService;
40 
41 class NotMatchingSurfaceMngAccessor
42  : public INotMatchingSurfaceMngAccessor {
43 public:
45  NotMatchingSurfaceMngAccessor(NotMatchingSurfaceMngService * p);
46 
48  virtual ~NotMatchingSurfaceMngAccessor() { }
49 
50 public:
51  boost::shared_ptr<IContactVariable> & getPropertyVariable(NotMatchingSurfaceProperty::eProperty property);
52  INotMatchingSurfaceMng * mng();
53  FaceFaceContactFamily *& facefaceContactFamily();
54  NodeFaceContactFamily *& nodefaceContactFamily();
55 
56 public:
57  NotMatchingSurfaceMngService * m_parent;
58  typedef std::map<NotMatchingSurfaceProperty::eProperty,boost::shared_ptr<IContactVariable> > Variables;
59  Variables variables;
60 };
61 
62 END_SURFACE_NAMESPACE
63 END_ARCGEOSIM_NAMESPACE
64 
65 /*---------------------------------------------------------------------------*/
66 
67 NotMatchingSurfaceMngAccessor::
68 NotMatchingSurfaceMngAccessor(NotMatchingSurfaceMngService * p)
69  : m_parent(p)
70 {
71  ;
72 }
73 
74 /*---------------------------------------------------------------------------*/
75 
76 boost::shared_ptr<IContactVariable> &
77 NotMatchingSurfaceMngAccessor::
78 getPropertyVariable(NotMatchingSurfaceProperty::eProperty property)
79 {
80  return variables[property];
81 }
82 
83 /*---------------------------------------------------------------------------*/
84 
85 INotMatchingSurfaceMng *
86 NotMatchingSurfaceMngAccessor::
87 mng()
88 {
89  return m_parent;
90 }
91

93 
94 FaceFaceContactFamily *&
95 NotMatchingSurfaceMngAccessor::
96 facefaceContactFamily()
97 {
98  return m_parent->m_faceface_family;
99 }

110 /*---------------------------------------------------------------------------*/
111 /*---------------------------------------------------------------------------*/
112 
113 NotMatchingSurfaceMngService::
114 NotMatchingSurfaceMngService(const Arcane::ServiceBuildInfo & sbi)
115  : ArcaneNotMatchingSurfaceMngObject(sbi)
116  , m_internal(new NotMatchingSurfaceMngAccessor(this))
117  , m_updater(NULL)
118  , m_properties(0)
119  , m_faceface_family(NULL)
120  , m_nodeface_family(NULL)
121  , m_is_contact_distribution_computed(false)
122 {
123  ;
124 }
125 
126 /*---------------------------------------------------------------------------*/
127 
128 NotMatchingSurfaceMngService::
129 ~NotMatchingSurfaceMngService()
130 {
131  delete m_faceface_family;
132  delete m_nodeface_family;
133  delete m_internal;
134 }
135 
136 /*---------------------------------------------------------------------------*/
137 
138 void
139 NotMatchingSurfaceMngService::
140 init()
141 {
142  if(options()->notMatchingSurfaceCalculator.size()>0)
143  {
144  m_updater = options()->notMatchingSurfaceCalculator[0];
145  m_updater->init();
146  }
147 
148  m_faceface_family = new FaceFaceContactFamily(traceMng(),mesh()->faceFamily());
149  m_nodeface_family = new NodeFaceContactFamily(traceMng(),mesh()->nodeFamily(),mesh()->faceFamily());
150 
151  m_is_contact_distribution_computed = options()->computeContactDistribution();
152 }
153 
154 /*---------------------------------------------------------------------------*/
155 
156 void
157 NotMatchingSurfaceMngService::
158 addProperties(Integer property)
159 {
160  ARCANE_ASSERT((NotMatchingSurfaceProperty::check(property)),("Inconsistent property [%d]",property));
161  m_properties |= property;
162  if(m_updater)
163  m_updater->addPropertiesTrigger(property);
164 }
165 
166 /*---------------------------------------------------------------------------*/
167 
168 Integer
169 NotMatchingSurfaceMngService::
170 getProperties() const
171 {
172  return m_properties;
173 }
174 
175 /*---------------------------------------------------------------------------*/
176 
177 bool
178 NotMatchingSurfaceMngService::
179 hasProperties(Integer property) const
180 {
181  ARCANE_ASSERT((NotMatchingSurfaceProperty::check(property)),("Inconsistent property [%d]",property));
182  return ( (m_properties & property) == property );
183 }
184 
185 /*---------------------------------------------------------------------------*/
186 
187 const IContactVariable *
188 NotMatchingSurfaceMngService::
189 getPropertyVariable(enum NotMatchingSurfaceProperty::eProperty property) const
190 {
191  const Internal::Variables & variables = m_internal->variables;
192  Internal::Variables::const_iterator finder = variables.find(property);
193  if (finder == variables.end())
194  return NULL;
195  else
196  return finder->second.get();
197 }
198 
199 /*---------------------------------------------------------------------------*/
200 
201 FaceFaceContactFamily *
202 NotMatchingSurfaceMngService::
203 facefaceContactFamily()
204 {
205  return m_faceface_family;
206 }
207 
208 /*---------------------------------------------------------------------------*/
209 
210 NodeFaceContactFamily *
211 NotMatchingSurfaceMngService::
212 nodefaceContactFamily()
213 {
214  return m_nodeface_family;
215 }
216 
217 /*---------------------------------------------------------------------------*/
218 
219 void
220 NotMatchingSurfaceMngService::
221 update()
222 {
223  if(m_updater)
224  m_updater->update(m_internal);
225  else
226  fatal()<<"NotMatchingBuilder has not be set";
227  // SDC pour utiliser la distribution des contacts (et y associer des DoFS) il nous faut les contacts fant�mes...
228  if (options()->computeContactDistribution()) {
229  m_faceface_family->computeSynchronizeInfos();
230  m_nodeface_family->computeSynchronizeInfos();
231  }
232 }
233 
234 /*---------------------------------------------------------------------------*/
235 
236 INotMatchingSurfaceBuilder *
237 NotMatchingSurfaceMngService::
238 switchBuilder(INotMatchingSurfaceBuilder* updater)
239 {
240  if (updater == m_updater)
241  {
242  return NULL;
243  }
244  else
245  {
246  INotMatchingSurfaceBuilder * old_updater = m_updater;
247  m_updater = updater;
248  Integer current_property = NotMatchingSurfaceProperty::PEnd;
249  while(current_property)
250  {
251  if (m_properties & current_property)
252  m_updater->addPropertiesTrigger(current_property);
253  current_property>>=1; // en attendant un enumerateur de propri�t�s
254  }
255  return old_updater;
256  }
257 }
258 
259 /*---------------------------------------------------------------------------*/
260 
261 NotMatchingSurfaceMngService::FaceFaceContactSupportType
262 NotMatchingSurfaceMngService::allFaceFaceContacts() const {
263  return m_faceface_family->allContacts() ;
264 }
265 
266 /*---------------------------------------------------------------------------*/
267 
268 NotMatchingSurfaceMngService::FaceSupportType
269 NotMatchingSurfaceMngService::allFaceFaceContactFaces() const {
270  return m_faceface_family->allFaces() ;
271 }
272 
273 /*---------------------------------------------------------------------------*/
274 
275 bool
276 NotMatchingSurfaceMngService::
277 isContactDistributionComputed() const {
278  return m_is_contact_distribution_computed;
279 }
280

284 ARCANE_REGISTER_SERVICE_NOTMATCHINGSURFACEMNG(NotMatchingSurfaceMng,NotMatchingSurfaceMngService);

void computeSynchronizeInfos() override
Calcul des entite fantomes. Cette operation est collective.
